name: Host Port Scan Detected by Remote Host
notes: Reports when more than 50 ports were scanned from a single source IP address more than 5 times within 3 minutes.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events with the same source IP more than 5 times
conditions_text: when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:HostDefinition: Servers
when the context is Remote to Local, Remote to Remote
when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Recon Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events with the same source IP more than 5 times, across more than 50 destination port within 3 minutes
thresholds: when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Recon Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events with the same source IP more than 5 times, across more than 50 destination port within 3 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Host Port Scan Detected by Remote Host on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND NOT when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:HostDefinition: Servers
AND when the context is Remote to Local, Remote to Remote
AND when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Recon Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events with the same source IP more than 5 times, across more than 50 destination port within 3 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Host Port Scan Detected by Remote Host
Event description: Detected multiple ports scans from a single source IP address.
